name: Cream of Chicken Soup Supreme
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Veal knuckle (have butcher crack it into 4 or finer Pieces)
2 Carrots, scrubbed and scraped, cut into 1/4 -inch pieces
3 Egg yolks. beaten until lemon yellow
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken, veal knuckle, and butter in a large soup kettle.
2. Lightly brown the outside of the chicken in the butter and the fat that will gather from the chicken and veal knuckle.
3. Add the carrots, parsley, celery, pepper, onion, and cold water. Continue to cook until it starts to boil.
4. Remove all surplus fat and froth that may gather on the top.
5. Turn down the heat and continue to simmer for 2 to 3 hours, or until a fork can be twisted in the meat of the chicken breast.
6. Remove the chicken and veal bones from the soup. Set them aside to cool.
7. Strain the soup through a fine sieve and set it aside to cool.
8. Carefully remove all of the fat from the surface once cooled.
9. Return the soup to the stove and bring it back to a simmer.
10. Remove all the meat from the chicken bones and discard all the skin and vegetable pieces, as you have already extracted all of the good ingredients.
11. Beat the cream, flour, and eggs together until all are smoothly blended. Add the salt to the simmering soup and mix well.
12. Take about 1/2 cup of the hot simmering soup and beat it into the egg and cream mixture. Slowly add the egg cream mixture to the soup, stirring constantly.
13. Continue to cook over low heat for a few minutes longer until the soup has thickened and lightly coats the spoon.
14. At this point, add the Tabasco if you like this sharpness in creamed soups.
15. Serve piping hot with saltines.
Serves 6 generously.
